name: sap-browser-automation
description: Use when an agent must inspect or operate an authenticated SAP web UI through an in-app Browser, Microsoft Edge CDP, or an existing Playwright client, especially when SAP SSO reuse, isolated Edge profiles, deterministic target selection, screenshots, or browser bootstrap recovery is required.

interface.shortDescription: Use when an agent must inspect or operate an authenticated SA...
interface.longDescription: Use when an agent must inspect or operate an authenticated SAP web UI through an in-app Browser, Microsoft Edge CDP, or an existing Playwright client, especially when SAP SSO reuse, isolated Edge profiles, deterministic target selection, screenshots, or browser bootstrap recovery is required.
defaultPrompt: Use SAP Browser Automation for SAP guidance.
